overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Witcher 3: Blood and Wine, showing the character Geralt walking through the Mediterranean-inspired city of Beauclair. The clip begins on a terrace overlooking a lake, continues through narrow cobblestone streets with stone archways and flowering vines, and ends on an upper terrace with panoramic views of the city and mountains.

agents.ego_description: walking through outdoor dining area past tables with seated NPCs

notable_agents.action: NPC in blue hat standing near table
seated NPC in orange vest gesturing with hand

entered.detail: blue lake visible beyond terrace railing with mountains in background
stone balustrade along terrace edge overlooking water
round table with white cloth and food items
brown fabric canopy over dining area

segments.scene_description: The scene opens on a sunlit terrace dining area overlooking a blue lake with distant mountains. Geralt walks past tables covered in white cloths where NPCs are seated and dining. A brown fabric canopy provides partial shade over the area, and stone railings line the edge of the terrace.

events.description: begins ascending wide stone staircase flanked by walls and trees

agents.ego_description: walking up wide stone staircase flanked by stone walls and olive trees

notable_agents.action: NPC in blue dress descending the stairs

entered.detail: wide stone steps with decorative balustrades on both sides
green leafy trees growing alongside the staircase

segments.scene_description: Geralt leaves the terrace and begins ascending a grand stone staircase between buildings. Olive trees line the right side of the stairs while stone walls flank the left. The camera follows the character upward as other NPCs walk down the stairs in the opposite direction.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered cobblestone alley with stone archways

events.description: enters narrow cobblestone street with overhead stone arches and hanging vegetation
light becomes dappled and diffused when passing under vegetation-covered arches

agents.ego_description: walking through narrow alleyway passing under stone arches covered in vines

notable_agents.action: woman in yellow dress walking alongside Geralt
two NPCs seated on stone bench against wall

entered.detail: irregular stone paving on narrow street
stone arch spanning the alleyway overhead
green ivy draping down stone building walls
bright red flowers growing on wall beside path

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions to a narrow cobblestone alley shaded by overhead stone arches and dense vegetation. Geralt walks through the covered passage where light filters through leaves creating dappled shadows. NPCs walk in various directions, some seated on stone benches, while red flowers and green ivy cover the walls.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered passage with red flowers leading to stairs with mural

events.description: enters covered passage with dense red flowering vines overhead
emerges from dark passage into brighter stairwell featuring a landscape mural

agents.ego_description: walking through flower-covered archway and ascending stairs past a painted mural

entered.detail: archway densely covered in red flowering vines
large painted landscape mural depicting lake and mountains on wall
smooth green painted building facade alongside stairs

segments.scene_description: Geralt passes through a dark passage covered in dense red flowering vines, then emerges into a stairwell illuminated by natural light. A large landscape mural is painted on the left wall depicting the local scenery. The character continues ascending stone stairs between green plaster walls and stone balustrades.

scene_state.functional_zone: upper terrace with panoramic city and mountain views

events.description: emerges onto open terrace with expansive view of city rooftops and distant mountains
pauses briefly at railing to overlook the cityscape alongside an NPC before continuing

agents.ego_description: walking along upper terrace and pausing to admire panoramic views of the city and mountains

notable_agents.action: painter sitting at easel working on canvas
armored guard standing at railing looking at mountain view

entered.detail: panoramic view of Beauclair city with red rooftops and distant mountains
wooden easel with canvas where NPC is painting
terracotta roof tiles of buildings visible below terrace
decorative stone balustrade along terrace edge

segments.scene_description: The final segment opens onto a bright upper terrace with sweeping views of the city and mountain range. Geralt walks past a painter working at an easel and pauses briefly alongside a guard at the railing to overlook the red-tiled rooftops below. The stone terrace is lined with potted plants and offers an expansive panorama of the surrounding landscape.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a sunlit lakeside terrace through the shaded corridors of a city, eventually ascending to a panoramic overlook. It begins on a dining terrace overlooking a blue lake and distant mountains, moving past white-clothed tables under a brown fabric canopy. As Geralt leaves the terrace, the camera follows him up a grand stone staircase lined with olive trees before transitioning into a narrow cobblestone alley shaded by stone arches and dappled light filtering through ivy and red flowers. The scene then shifts through a dark passage draped in flowering vines into a bright stairwell featuring a large landscape mural on the wall. Finally, the camera emerges onto a high upper terrace, passing a painter and a guard to reveal an expansive view of red-tiled rooftops and the surrounding mountain range.
